items.title: Kanban board view
items.description: Drag-and-drop task management with To Do / In Progress / Done columns.

items.title: AI-assisted goal planning
items.description: Generate focused task breakdowns from plain-text goals using Claude AI with iterative refinement.

items.title: Story points & writing tiers
items.description: Gamification layer: earn points on task completion and climb from Poem to Epic.

items.title: Admin dashboard & audit log
items.description: Platform-wide metrics, request logs, and user activity tracking for admins.

items.title: Sub-page routing
items.description: Dedicated pages for the tier ladder reference and the full feature guide.

items.title: Accounts integration
items.description: Link tasks to user profiles with preferences and cross-service identity.

items.title: Contacts & opportunities linking
items.description: Associate tasks directly with CRM contacts and open opportunities.

items.title: Activity feed
items.description: Real-time feed of task completions, plan creations, and tier progressions.

items.title: Automation rules
items.description: Trigger task creation and status transitions from external events.

items.title: Cross-service search
items.description: Full-text search across tasks, goals, and linked CRM records via the search service.

items.title: Reporting & velocity charts
items.description: Export story point history, sprint velocity, and goal completion rates.

items.title: Keyboard shortcuts
items.description: Full keyboard navigation for the task board, planner, and modals.
